outputs.description: Json output of the indicators. Should be the input for the *microsoft-atp-indicator-batch-update*. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.indicatorValue The value of the Indicator.
outputs.name: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.JsonOutput

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.indicatorType Type of the indicator. Possible values are: FileSha1, FileSha256, FileMd5, CertificateThumbprint, IpAddress, DomainName, Url TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.lastUpdateTime
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.lastUpdatedBy Identity of the user/application that last updated the indicator. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.action
outputs.name: The last time the indicator was updated.
The action that will be taken if the indicator will be discovered in the organization. Possible values are: "Warn", "Block", "Audit", "Alert", "AlertAndBlock", "BlockAndRemediate" and "Allowed".
The expiration time of the indicator.

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.Severity The severity of the indicator. possible values are: Informational, Low, Medium and High. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.application
outputs.name: The date and time when the indicator was created.

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.externalID Id the customer can submit in the request for custom correlation. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.sourceType
outputs.name: The application associated with the indicator.

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.createdBySource The name of the user or application that submitted the indicator. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.createdBy
outputs.name: User in case the Indicator created by a user. "AadApp" in case it submitted using automated application via the API.
Unique identity of the user or application that submitted the indicator.

outputs.description: TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.rbacGroupIds RBAC device group ID's where the indicator is exposed and active. Empty list in case it exposed to all devices. TransformIndicatorToMSDefenderIOC.Indicators.generateAlert
outputs.name: RBAC device group names where the indicator is exposed and active. Empty list in case it exposed to all devices.
True if alert generation is required, False if this indicator should not generate an alert.
